_meta.note: ANONYMIZED, English, k>=3-org distilled patterns from Binclusive's dynamic-audit corpus. Failure-shapes clustered offline by LLM (frozen in data/clusters/), gated k>=3-distinct-org and anonymized by deterministic code. Contains NO customer identifiers (org/project ids, elements, urls stripped; frequency as tier only). Regenerate by re-running the distiller.

patterns.failureShape: When a modal, dialog, panel, or menu overlay opens, keyboard focus stays on the trigger instead of moving into the new content, so screen-reader and keyboard users don't know it opened and tab through the background page first.
patterns.fix: On open, move focus to the dialog container (or its first focusable element / heading) and trap focus inside it. On close, return focus to the trigger.

patterns.failureShape: After a navigation or step change (detail page, OTP/verification screen, multi-step form), focus and the screen-reader virtual cursor stay on the old DOM, so the user never reaches — or even hears — the new content.
patterns.fix: On each navigation or step change, move focus to the new view's heading or first control so assistive tech follows the transition. Announce the new page title.
